name: pb
description: Product Builder v1.4.2 — registry-backed prototype builder with a unified 5-tab UI, a cheap build loop, a small memory layer, a design-system-agnostic core, and a two-mode hand-off. Provides /pb:init, /pb:specify, /pb:clarify, /pb:plan, /pb:build (+ check-design-system, figma-handoff), /pb:sync-flow, /pb:sync-erd, /pb:check-drift, /pb:hand-off, /pb:validate, /pb:migrate.
